name: Transmurdera
description: A Hyperion SMG built for sustained bursts, starting out loose and tightening the longer you hold the trigger. Its matching Hyperion barrel sharpens the weapon's accuracy and control even more, though the magazine is smaller in return. It performs best when you can stay on target long enough to let the recoil pattern settle.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, it commonly appears with Hyperion's newer materials and a similar prefix style. A related variant there, the Pro-Target, is produced by the older Hyperion line. It appears only at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable world-drop sources.
